title: Cavegrammer (Cave Mod Programmer Art)
description:
Makes the textures of a few modern cave-themed minecraft mods fit in with Programmer Art (Galosphere, Spelunkery, Oreganized, Caverns & Chasms, Dolt mod how, Amendments, etc)
this is the base pack of my programmer art resource pack series!
body:
This pack changes a majority of the textures in [Oreganized,](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized) [Galosphere,](https://modrinth.com/mod/galosphere) [Spelunkery](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery) and [Caverns & Chasms](https://modrinth.com/mod/caverns-and-chasms) to ones that resemble the style of pre-texture update Minecraft. Features a large amount of textures derived from [Programmer Art Continuation Project](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp) (with permission). Some (albeit few) textures also derived from [Classic Faithful*](https://www.faithfulpack.net/classicfaithful/32x-programmer-art), old [Biomes o' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty) versions*, 4J studio's [Legacy Console Edition Texturepacks](https://modrinth.com/organization/nostalgica-reverie/resourcepacks), ***[Reminiscence](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/reminiscence) assets (by drbruhmoments & bbali), and the [Minecraft Alpha 1.0.16 Versions](https://www.youtube.com/@MinecraftAlphaVersions) webseries.
INTENDED FOR USE WITH [GSOC COMPAT](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gsoc-compat)

If you're wondering why a few less mods are supported than before, I've split a few mods off into themed packs to reduce filesize & let people mix and match depending on what kinds of mods they have:

**[Nether Expansion, My Nether's Delight, Rubinated Nether](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nostalgic-nether/gallery)**

**[Dungeons Mobs, Born in Chaos, Sons of Sins, Alex's Mobs, Species](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-creatures)**

**[Archery Expansion & Shield Expansion](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/archery-expansion-progart)**


- [Create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Caverns & Chasms](https://modrinth.com/mod/caverns-and-chasms)
- [Galosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/galosphere)
- [Spelunkery](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery)
- [Oreganized](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized)
- [GSOC Compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gsoc-compat)
- [Quark (bare minimum)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark)
- [Carcinogenius](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized-carcinogenius)
- [Dolt Mod How](https://modrinth.com/mod/dolt-mod-how)
- [Cloud Storage (Unfinished)](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-cloud-storage)
- [I Wanna Skate](https://modrinth.com/mod/i-wanna-skate)
- [Lucky TNT Mod (Unfinished)](https://modrinth.com/mod/lucky-tnt-mod)
- [Snow! Real Magic!](https://modrinth.com/mod/snow-real-magic)
- [Snowy Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/snowy-spirit)
- [Haunted Harvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/haunted-harvest)
- [Integrated Lucky Blocks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/integrated-lucky-blocks)
- [Diamond in the Rough](https://modrinth.com/mod/diamond-in-the-rough)
- [Apotheosis (very unfinished)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis)
- [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments)

*this might not even be true anymore lol, i think i got rid of all the mods that i was using these textures for
** Only features a few textures. Textures used are mostly derived from spGrace's [Create: World of Color](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-world-of-color) with permission. Copper pallete edited to fit better with PACP copper. Deepslate zinc ore edited to use PACP deepslate.
***Farmer's Delight - Programmer Art assets used with permission (Proof of Permission in images)
****some haunted harvest textures by kruta zhaba(the coolest frog)

Feel free to use in modpacks!
